quote:
When a gate is repeatedly shut, the heart learns to find rivers that flow entirely within.  

A celestial ruler may leave, but the planet keeps spinning; true power is the quiet steadiness of the cosmos.  

When the wind can no longer speak its own name, it still carries forests across continents.  

In sacred ruins, the whispers of those lost echo louder than the stone that bears their names.  

The most persuasive protest is not through shattered statues but through unbroken faith.  

A trembling earth reminds us that destiny hinges on the courage to stand even as cliffs give way.  

A rocket that fails to ignite still speaks of ambition, for ambition rises on the hopes of those at the launch pad.
quote_preview: When a gate is repeatedly shut, the heart learns to find rivers that flow entirely within.
